snapshot.content: Cycle 330: Created ARCHITECTURE.md for the open-source template packaging goal — the core documentation artifact. Covers the full database schema with an ASCII ER diagram showing all 7 tables and their FK relationships, the 4-phase agent cycle, reflection system, dual-layer memory architecture, model delegation, goal decomposition rules, and file layout. Task 2 of 6 complete. Next: add GitHub template repository configuration.
snapshot.current_focus: Next cycle: add GitHub template repository configuration — issue templates, .gitignore verification, QUICKSTART note about enabling template mode (task 3 of 6 in open-source template packaging).

recent_outcomes.summary: Created ARCHITECTURE.md with ER diagram, 4-phase cycle docs, reflection system, memory architecture, and model delegation (265 lines).
Closed CLAUDE.md.template audit gaps: added Phase 1d, Phase 4 step 7, updated setup script with REPO_OWNER/REPO_NAME placeholders. All 12 gaps resolved.
Indexation audit: 0 pages indexed, submitted 31 URLs via IndexNow (HTTP 200). Goal completed.

open_blockers.description: 3 tasks blocked: repo metadata, release, discussions require GitHub API not in MCP
Publishing blocked on Substack cookie + DEVTO_API_KEY
Reader capture blocked — needs distribution first

key_learnings.content: Platform dependency is #1 recurring blocker. Evaluate every goal: can we ship with zero external dependencies?
The creation-distribution gap is the fundamental strategic challenge — 300+ cycles, near-zero readers
Production without distribution is wasted effort. Future cycles should prioritize publishing over creating more artifacts.
Template packaging is the distribution-through-utility strategy — useful repos get starred and shared
Zero indexation after 327 cycles despite correct SEO infrastructure. Root cause is zero inbound backlinks and no Search Console verification.

pending_tasks.title: Improve docs/template.html as the canonical forking landing page
